enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vilayadu Mankatha'?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace life and enjoy the moment.

How does 'Vilayadu Mankatha' fit into the plot of the movie Mankatha?

This song is featured during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the carefree and adventurous spirit of the characters.

Who are the singers of 'Vilayadu Mankatha'?

The song features a collaboration of talented artists including Anitha, Premgi Amaren, Ranjith, Sucharita, and Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Who composed the music for 'Vilayadu Mankatha'?

The music for this energetic track was composed by the renowned Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Vilayadu Mankatha' released?

The song was released on May 21, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Mankatha, Vilayadu Mankatha serves as a vibrant celebration of life and freedom. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The collaboration of multiple talented singers adds depth to the energetic vibe of the song. Overall, it encapsulates the essence of enjoying life's moments to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vilayadu Mankatha from Mankatha is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and fun. Featuring a unique collaboration of talented singers like Anitha, Ranjith, and Premgi Amaren, this track is a must-listen for anyone looking to elevate their mood. With Yuvan Shankar Raja's dynamic composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Play the game, we won't let go. Don't put on a disguise, victory is coming to us. Play the game, we won't let go. Don't put on a disguise, victory is coming to us.
Don't change your heart, okay? Don't lose your happiness, okay? Remove the troubles, and throw away the burdens.
Let the body burn, oh, let your thoughts ignite. Ah, let new rules be written, and let the revolution be built.
The one who touches me, takes away my sorrow, and becomes my companion.
Isn't it the beginning, the whole world is shining? Words can't express it.
The strength of my mind is my power, my friend. Devotion is my work, and I always achieve success.
This is a new voice, a true voice. After understanding this, there is no obstacle to your responsibility. New work must be done, move forward.
Play the game... We won't let go. Don't put on a disguise, victory is coming to us. Play the game, we won't let go. Don't put on a disguise, victory is coming to us.
Don't let humanity fade away, okay? Don't forget your memories, okay? Let your dreams win, okay? Keep your thoughts in your work.
Let your relationships grow, okay? Let your heights be achieved, okay? Let the truth be established, okay? Don't forget to look back at beauty.
Play the game, we won't let go... Mankatha Song Lyrics. My friend, open the bottle. This is our party, my friend. Come on, let's go.
